title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Device updating
scenario: No notification appears during DFU when Notification master toggle is OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
Set the Notification master toggle to OFF.
Pair or connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device to the app.
Trigger a Device Firmware Update (DFU) process for the connected device.
Send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
Observe whether any notification related to the DFU process appears in the device's notification shade.
expected: No DFU-related notification appears in the notification shade while the app is in the background.
